title: Section 21
content: Nothing in this Chapter shall apply to or in relation to the 14 eviction under any law of a tenant from any building in a slum area belonging to the Government, 15 the Delhi Development Authority or any local authority.
footnote: 14. Subs. by Act 43 of 1964, s. 13, for “execution of any decree or order under any law for the eviction” (w.e.f. 27-2-1965). 15. Subs. by s. 13, ibid., for “the Delhi Improvement Trust” (w.e.f. 27-2-1965)
